_comment_: VYRA pa11y-ci config (KAP 5c.2 — vyrazeus §5c.2). The defaults assume the dev stack is up at http://localhost:8000 (Nginx in front of the FastAPI app). For one-off scans on a different host, override at the CLI: `pa11y-ci --config .pa11yci.json --threshold 0`. The urls list below is the critical-flow allowlist; new UI surfaces should land with an entry alongside the code change.
